segment.source: Renders an optional heading above two or three balanced columns, each column holding its own required rich-text block (paragraphs, lists, links). Use it for: long flowing body copy that reads better split across the page, parallel text sections without card framing, multi-part notes, terms excerpts or newspaper-style editorial text. Prefer 'Content Grid' when items need titles, cards and links; 'Split Text & Media' when text should sit beside an image.
